wiki.summary: “Heard ‘Em Say” was released as the third single from Late Registration. The single achieved gold status while peaking at #26 on the Billboard Hot 100 and #12 on the Hot Rap Tracks chart. Kanye reflects on the harsh realities in life and how things happen for a reason. This song samples “Someone That I Used to Love” by Natalie Cole. Adam Levine’s lyrics would be later used in Maroon 5’s song “Nothing Lasts Forever.” Read more on Last.fm.
